package rulecoverage

func NegativeStringConcatInLoop() string {
    ruleID := "string_concat_in_loop"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "info"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Repeated string concatenation inside loops (O(n^2) risk)."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
